# UX Plan: AI Maintenance Intake MVP

**Feature**: P1-001 — AI Maintenance Intake MVP
**Generated by**: `/ux-design`

---

## Component Hierarchy

```
apps/web/
  app/
    layout.tsx                          — Root layout (Clerk provider, Sonner toaster, theme)
    globals.css                         — Tailwind base + shadcn CSS variables
    (auth)/
      layout.tsx                        — Centered card shell (no nav)
      sign-in/[[...sign-in]]/page.tsx   — Clerk sign-in
      sign-up/[[...sign-up]]/page.tsx   — Clerk sign-up with role selection
    (tenant)/
      layout.tsx                        — Tenant shell (mobile bottom nav)
      submit/page.tsx
        SubmitForm
          PhotoUploader
          Textarea + Label
          Button "Submit"
        GatekeeperResponse (conditional, replaces form)
          Card > CardHeader > CardTitle
          Two large Buttons
      requests/page.tsx
        PageHeader
        ScrollArea
          RequestCard[]
            UrgencyBadge
            Badge (category)
            Badge (status)
    (landlord)/
      layout.tsx                        — Landlord shell (sidebar-07 desktop, bottom nav mobile)
        SidebarProvider > AppSidebar (sidebar-07)
        SidebarInset
          SiteHeader (breadcrumb + user menu)
          {children}
      dashboard/page.tsx
        SectionCards (4 stat cards)
        SpendChart (ChartBarInteractive)
      requests/page.tsx
        PageHeader + FilterBar (Select, Select, Input)
        DataTable (TanStack Table + Table)
          RequestCard (mobile fallback) or TableRow (desktop)
      requests/[id]/page.tsx
        RequestDetailHeader
          UrgencyBadge, category, status
        PhotoGallery (Dialog for zoom)
        AIClassificationCard
          CostEstimate
        WorkOrderDraft (Textarea)
        VendorSelector (Select or Combobox)
        ApproveButton → AlertDialog → Sonner toast
      properties/page.tsx
        PageHeader + "Add Property" Button → Sheet
        PropertyList
          PropertyCard (Card)
            TenantList (collapsible)
            "Add Tenant" → Sheet
      vendors/page.tsx
        PageHeader + "Add Vendor" Button → Sheet
        VendorList
          VendorCard (Card)
          "Edit" → Sheet, "Delete" → AlertDialog
```

---

## shadcn/ui Blocks to Install

- **`dashboard-01`**: Structural template for landlord shell and `/dashboard` page — provides `SidebarProvider`, `AppSidebar`, `SidebarInset`, `SiteHeader`, `SectionCards`, and chart patterns
- **`sidebar-07`**: Landlord sidebar — collapses to icon-only at small desktop widths

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add @shadcn/dashboard-01 @shadcn/sidebar-07
```

---

## shadcn/ui Components Needed

**Installed via blocks:**
- `sidebar`, `card`, `chart`, `table`, `badge`, `button`, `input`, `dropdown-menu`, `breadcrumb`, `avatar`

**Needs separate install:**
```bash
npx shadcn@latest add textarea select dialog alert-dialog sheet drawer sonner skeleton progress separator scroll-area tabs label tooltip collapsible
```

Components: `textarea`, `select`, `dialog`, `alert-dialog`, `sheet`, `drawer`, `sonner`, `skeleton`, `progress`, `separator`, `scroll-area`, `tabs`, `label`, `tooltip`, `collapsible`, combobox (composes Command + Popover)

---

## Layout Structure

### Root Shell (`app/layout.tsx`)
- `ClerkProvider` wrapping everything
- `Toaster` (Sonner) at root
- CSS custom properties for sidebar width and header height

### Tenant Shell (`app/(tenant)/layout.tsx`)
- No sidebar — tenants are primarily mobile
- `min-h-screen flex flex-col`
- Sticky top header: app name/logo + Clerk `UserButton`
- Sticky bottom nav (2 items): "Submit" (`PlusSquareIcon`) and "My Requests" (`ListIcon`)
- Bottom nav height: `h-16` (64px), items `h-12 w-12` (meets 44px minimum)
- Page content: `flex-1 overflow-y-auto pb-16`

### Landlord Shell (`app/(landlord)/layout.tsx`)
- Based on `dashboard-01`: `SidebarProvider > AppSidebar + SidebarInset`
- Desktop (`lg+`): sidebar-07 with labels
- Tablet (`md`): sidebar collapses to icons
- Mobile (`< md`): sidebar hidden, bottom nav with 4 items (Dashboard, Requests, Properties, Vendors)
- `SidebarInset` contains sticky `SiteHeader` with breadcrumb + Clerk `UserButton`

### Content Widths
- Mobile: `w-full px-4 py-4`
- Tablet (`md`): `max-w-screen-md mx-auto px-6`
- Desktop (`lg+`): full content area within `SidebarInset`, `px-6 lg:px-8`

---

## Page-by-Page Design

### `/sign-in` and `/sign-up`
- Clerk `<SignIn />` and `<SignUp />` in centered card layout
- Role selection after sign-up: two large `Card` components — "I'm a Landlord" / "I'm a Tenant" (stacked on mobile)

### Tenant `/submit`
**State machine: form → loading → gatekeeper response → (resolved | escalated)**

- `Card` with issue description `Textarea` (min 4 rows) + `PhotoUploader` + full-width `Button`
- After submit: inline state transition (no page navigation)
- **GatekeeperResponse** replaces form with:
  - If self-resolvable: amber-bordered card with troubleshooting guide + "This fixed it" / "I still need help" buttons
  - If not self-resolvable: green confirmation "Your request has been submitted"

**PhotoUploader:**
- Mobile: single button using `<input type="file" accept="image/*" capture="environment">`
- Desktop: drag-and-drop dashed border zone
- Preview: `grid grid-cols-3 gap-2`, thumbnails with `X` remove button
- Max 5 photos

### Tenant `/requests`
- `Tabs`: "All / Active / Resolved"
- `ScrollArea` with `RequestCard[]`
- `RequestCard`: full-width, `border-l-4` colored by urgency, category icon, truncated description, urgency + status badges, date
- Empty state: mail icon + "No requests yet" + CTA

### Landlord `/dashboard`
- **Emergency alert banner** at top if any emergency requests (red `Alert`, `role="alert"`)
- **SectionCards** (4 stat cards in `grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4`):
  1. Emergency count (destructive badge + AlertTriangleIcon)
  2. Open requests count
  3. Avg time to resolution (ClockIcon)
  4. Monthly spend (DollarSignIcon)
- **SpendChart**: bar chart — spend vs rent per property, date-range selector
- **Recent Activity**: last 5 requests as compact list
- **Zero state**: "Getting Started" checklist (Add property → Add vendor → Share submit link)

### Landlord `/requests`
- **Desktop (`lg+`)**: `DataTable` with TanStack Table
  - Columns: Urgency | Category | Property | Tenant | Description | Date | Status | Actions
  - Sortable, filterable (Property, Urgency, Status selects + text search)
- **Mobile (`< lg`)**: card list with `Drawer` filter panel
- `Tabs`: "All / Emergency / In Progress / Resolved"
- Emergency requests always sorted to top

### Landlord `/requests/[id]`
- **Desktop**: `lg:grid lg:grid-cols-3 lg:gap-8`
- **Left (lg:col-span-2)**: header, tenant message, PhotoGallery (grid + Dialog zoom), WorkOrderDraft (editable Textarea)
- **Right (lg:col-span-1, sticky)**: AIClassificationCard (category, urgency, confidence Progress, action), CostEstimate (range + disclaimer), VendorSelector (Combobox by specialty), Approve & Send button (AlertDialog confirmation)
- **Mobile**: single column, sticky bottom "Approve & Send" bar

### Landlord `/properties`
- Card list per property with `Collapsible` tenant list
- Add/Edit via `Sheet` forms
- Empty state: building icon + "No properties yet" + CTA

### Landlord `/vendors`
- Grid: `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3`
- Card per vendor: name, specialty badge, phone, email
- Add/Edit via `Sheet`, Delete via `AlertDialog`
- Empty state: wrench icon + CTA

---

## Navigation Pattern

### Tenant (mobile-optimized, minimal)
- Bottom nav: 2 items — Submit (`PlusSquareIcon`) + My Requests (`ListIcon`)
- Top header: app logo (left) + `UserButton` (right)
- Active: filled icon + `text-primary`

### Landlord (management UI)
- Desktop (`lg+`): sidebar-07 — Dashboard, Requests (with badge), Properties, Vendors. Footer: `UserButton`
- Mobile (`< lg`): bottom nav with same 4 items
- Active: `bg-sidebar-accent text-sidebar-accent-foreground`

### Role-based routing (`middleware.ts`)
- Unauthenticated → `/sign-in`
- Tenant → redirect `/` and `/dashboard` to `/submit`
- Landlord → redirect `/` and `/submit` to `/dashboard`
- Cross-role → 403 page

---

## Data Flow

| Page | API Calls |
|------|-----------|
| Tenant `/submit` | `POST /api/upload` (photos) → `POST /api/intake` (message + paths) |
| Tenant `/requests` | `GET /api/requests?tenant_id=[clerk_id]` |
| Landlord `/dashboard` | `GET /api/dashboard/stats`, `GET /api/dashboard/spend-chart` |
| Landlord `/requests` | `GET /api/requests?landlord_id=[clerk_id]&property=&urgency=&status=` |
| Landlord `/requests/[id]` | `GET /api/requests/[id]`, `PATCH /api/requests/[id]`, `POST /api/requests/[id]/dispatch` |
| Landlord `/properties` | `GET/POST /api/properties`, `PATCH/DELETE /api/properties/[id]`, `POST /api/properties/[id]/tenants` |
| Landlord `/vendors` | `GET/POST /api/vendors`, `PATCH/DELETE /api/vendors/[id]` |

---

---

## Accessibility

- Color is never the only urgency indicator — uses icon + text alongside color
- All interactive elements: `min-h-11 min-w-11` (44px touch targets)
- Focus rings on all interactive elements (shadcn default)
- Color contrast: 4.5:1 normal text, 3:1 large text
- `prefers-reduced-motion`: disable entrance animations
- Bottom nav: `role="navigation"`, `aria-label="Main navigation"`, `aria-current="page"`
- Form inputs: `<label htmlFor>`, `aria-required`, `aria-describedby` for errors
- Photo gallery: `alt="Maintenance photo [n]"`, Dialog close `aria-label`
- Confidence bar: `role="progressbar"` with `aria-valuenow/min/max`
- Emergency banner: `role="alert" aria-live="assertive"`
- Data table: `aria-sort` on sortable columns

---

## Responsive Breakpoints

| Breakpoint | Tenant | Landlord |
|---|---|---|
| `< 640px` (mobile) | Single column, bottom nav, full-width cards | Single column, bottom nav, card list |
| `640px–1023px` (tablet) | Same as mobile, wider content | 2-col stat cards, bottom nav |
| `1024px+` (desktop) | Same layout (rarely used) | Sidebar appears, DataTable, 2-col detail |

Key behaviors:
- `/requests` landlord: `< lg` → cards, `lg+` → DataTable
- `/requests/[id]`: `< lg` → single column + sticky bottom approve, `lg+` → 2-col grid
- `SectionCards`: `grid-cols-2` → `lg:grid-cols-4`
- `/vendors`: `grid-cols-1` → `md:grid-cols-2` → `lg:grid-cols-3`
- `Sheet` forms: `w-full` on mobile, `w-96` on desktop

---

## Open Questions

1. **Anonymous tenant submission** — Should tenants need Clerk accounts, or can they submit via a shareable link (`/submit?property=[token]`) without signing up? Reduces friction but complicates status tracking.

2. **Sidebar vs. hamburger on mobile** — Bottom nav was chosen for native-app feel. Alternative: hamburger → Sheet from left (more standard web). Recommend bottom nav.

3. **Confidence score display** — Progress bar may confuse non-technical landlords. Alternative: simple "High / Medium / Low" text label. Recommend text label for v1, add progress bar later.

4. **Zero state for new landlords** — Empty dashboard needs a "Getting Started" checklist (Add property → Add vendor → Share submit link). Critical first-run UX moment.

5. **Work order save behavior** — Auto-save on blur (low friction, good for mobile) vs explicit "Save Draft" button. Recommend blur-save.
